248.reason: [When encountering a single '&', the code records an error but then calls retract() and next(), which may skip necessary error handling or cause infinite recursion because next() will reprocess the same '&' again. Additionally, after adding the error, it should not continue normal tokenization by calling next() recursively.]

Instead, it should advance past the invalid '&' without re-invoking the full next() logic.]
